dataList.name: Boombox of Dramatic Entrances
dataList.desc:
On Hit using Blunt Skills: Heal 5% of damage dealt by the ally who used the Skill

On Hit using Counter Skills: Heal 5 SP (2 times per turn per Identity)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Heal HP proportional to damage dealt

dataList.name: ENTER: The B.B.
dataList.desc:
When an ally is hit, apply 3 [AttackUp] on the ally and inflict +4 [Laceration] Count on the attacker (once per Skill)

Base Skills used by The Middle-faction Identities gain Base Power +1 and deal +(30 / # of Coins)% damage
- Turn Start: If there are 3+ The Middle-faction Identities on the field, gain Base Power +1 and deal +(60 / # of Coins)% damage instead
- If there are 5+ The Middle-faction Identities on the field, gain Base Power +2 and deal +(90 / # of Coins)% damage instead

On Hit using Blunt Skills: Heal 10% of damage dealt by the ally who used the Skill

On Hit using Counter Skills: Heal 5 SP (2 times per turn per Identity)

Turn End: If the ally who equipped a Counter Skill at Combat Start did not get to use a Counter Skill this turn, the said ally gains 1 [PlusCoinValueUp] and 1 [MinusCoinValueDown] next turn

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Attacker gains [Laceration] Count, attacked ally gains [AttackUp]
Gain Base Power and deal more damage
Heal HP proportional to damage dealt

dataList.name: Heishou Bolus - Mao
dataList.desc:
When a Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Identity enters the Encounter for the first time, cap its min Speed to 10 for a turn (at 10+ min Speed, this effect does not activate)

If an ally has [LegStrength], the ally's Base Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Clash Power and deal more damage

dataList.name: Shadowlurking
dataList.desc:
When a Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Identity enters the Encounter for the first time, cap its min Speed to 10 for 3 turns (at 10+ min Speed, this effect does not activate)

Base Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage for every [LegStrength] Stack

When inflicting [BurstAgility], also inflict it on 2 enemies that do not have [BurstAgility] (once per turn; in Focused Encounters, Parts)

If an ally's Speed is faster than its target's, the ally's Skills inflict (Speed difference / 3) more [Burst] or [Burst] Count (max 3)

Turn End: Heishou Pack - Mao Branch allies gain 2 [Agility] next turn
If an ally's Speed is faster than its target's, or when an ally uses an Unopposed Attack, the said ally deals +10% Slash damage for every (Speed difference / 3) (max 30%)
If an ally's Speed is faster than its target's, take -10% damage for every (Speed difference / 3) (max 30%)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Clash Power and deal more damage
